description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to a random enemy 12 times.
Summons 5 homing arrows that track enemies. Upon attacking, consumes 1 arrow to deal additional Physical DMG to the enemy.

Deals Physical DMG to enemies in a straight line and knocks them down for [???->3 sec]. This damage increases based on the target’s lost HP, up to a maximum of 100%. Additionally, against Bosses, deals additional Physical DMG, and this damage is applied with 500 higher Physical DEF Penetration.

After using a Skill or Normal Attack, increases ATK and Crit Chance by [100->80] for [5 sec->7sec]. [Moonlight Arrow] stacks up to 6 times. At max stacks, [Moonlight Arrow] cannot be gained during the duration, but Normal Attacks fire 3 additional arrows, each dealing Physical DMG.

dark.unified: Has a 50% chance to stun enemies hit for [0.6 sec->0.5 sec].

light.unified: Attack Speed increases by [8%->5%] per stack.

dark.unified: Damage dealt to bosses increases by 5% per stack. [(removed) At the start of battle, Attack is increased by 10%. This Attack increase stacks up to 10 times, and at 10 stacks, damage dealt to bosses is increased by 20%.]
Your Critical Rate is reduced by 300, but Critical DMG increases by [150%->70%].

description.unified: On Crit, increases ATK Spd by {0}% for 10 sec. During the duration, Normal Attacks fire an additional arrow that deals {1}% extra Physical DMG to the target. This additional DMG can be triggered once every 0.5 sec.
